title: Minister of Intelligence (Five Worlds)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Minister of Intelligence''' was the head of the [[Ministry of Intelligence (Five Worlds)|Ministry of Intelligence]] for the [[Five Worlds]]. The Minister was in charge of civilian matters concerning Intelligence and was a member of the [[High Cabinet]]. The first Minister was [[Gavele Lemora]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''
